verses.latin_vulgate: Responsio mollis frangit iram ;  sermo durus suscitat furorem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַֽעֲנֶה־רַּ֭ךְ יָשִׁ֣יב חֵמָ֑ה וּדְבַר־עֶ֝֗צֶב יַעֲלֶה־אָֽף׃
verses.king_james: A soft answer turneth away wrath: but grievous words stir up anger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lingua sapientium ornat scientiam ;  os fatuorum ebullit stultitiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְשׁ֣וֹן חֲ֭כָמִים תֵּיטִ֣יב דָּ֑עַת וּפִ֥י כְ֝סִילִ֗ים יַבִּ֥יעַ אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.king_james: The tongue of the wise useth knowledge aright: but the mouth of fools poureth out foolishness.

verses.latin_vulgate: In omni loco, oculi Domini  contemplantur bonos et malos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּֽכׇל־מָ֭קוֹם עֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה צֹ֝פ֗וֹת רָעִ֥ים וְטוֹבִֽים׃
verses.king_james: The eyes of the Lord are in every place, beholding the evil and the good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lingua placabilis lignum vitæ ;  quæ autem immoderata est conteret spiritum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַרְפֵּ֣א לָ֭שׁוֹן עֵ֣ץ חַיִּ֑ים וְסֶ֥לֶף בָּ֝֗הּ שֶׁ֣בֶר בְּרֽוּחַ׃
verses.king_james: A wholesome tongue is a tree of life: but perverseness therein is a breach in the spirit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Stultus irridet disciplinam patris sui ;  qui autem custodit increpationes astutior fiet.  In abundanti justitia virtus maxima est :  cogitationes autem impiorum eradicabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱוִ֗יל יִ֭נְאַץ מוּסַ֣ר אָבִ֑יו וְשֹׁמֵ֖ר תּוֹכַ֣חַת יַעְרִֽים׃
verses.king_james: A fool despiseth his father’s instruction: but he that regardeth reproof is prudent.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domus justi plurima fortitudo,  et in fructibus impii conturbatio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֣ית צַ֭דִּיק חֹ֣סֶן רָ֑ב וּבִתְבוּאַ֖ת רָשָׁ֣ע נֶעְכָּֽרֶת׃
verses.king_james: In the house of the righteous is much treasure: but in the revenues of the wicked is trouble.

verses.latin_vulgate: Labia sapientium disseminabunt scientiam ;  cor stultorum dissimile erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׂפְתֵ֣י חֲ֭כָמִים יְזָ֣רוּ דָ֑עַת וְלֵ֖ב כְּסִילִ֣ים לֹא־כֵֽן׃
verses.king_james: The lips of the wise disperse knowledge: but the heart of the foolish doeth not so.

verses.latin_vulgate: Victimæ impiorum abominabiles Domino ;  vota justorum placabilia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֣בַח רְ֭שָׁעִים תּוֹעֲבַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֑ה וּתְפִלַּ֖ת יְשָׁרִ֣ים רְצוֹנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination to the Lord: but the prayer of the upright is his delight.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abominatio est Domino via impii ;  qui sequitur justitiam diligitur ab eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹעֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה דֶּ֣רֶךְ רָשָׁ֑ע וּמְרַדֵּ֖ף צְדָקָ֣ה יֶאֱהָֽב׃
verses.king_james: The way of the wicked is an abomination unto the Lord: but he loveth him that followeth after righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Doctrina mala deserenti viam vitæ ;  qui increpationes odit, morietur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מוּסָ֣ר רָ֭ע לְעֹזֵ֣ב אֹ֑רַח שׂוֹנֵ֖א תוֹכַ֣חַת יָמֽוּת׃
verses.king_james: Correction is grievous unto him that forsaketh the way: and he that hateth reproof shall die.

verses.latin_vulgate: Infernus et perditio coram Domino ;  quanto magis corda filiorum hominum !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁא֣וֹל וַ֭אֲבַדּוֹן נֶ֣גֶד יְהֹוָ֑ה אַ֝֗ף כִּֽי־לִבּ֥וֹת בְּֽנֵי־אָדָֽם׃
verses.king_james: Hell and destruction are before the Lord: how much more then the hearts of the children of men?

verses.latin_vulgate: Non amat pestilens eum qui se corripit,  nec ad sapientes graditur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֣א יֶאֱהַב־לֵ֭ץ הוֹכֵ֣חַֽ ל֑וֹ אֶל־חֲ֝כָמִ֗ים לֹ֣א יֵלֵֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: A scorner loveth not one that reproveth him: neither will he go unto the wise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cor gaudens exhilarat faciem ;  in mœrore animi dejicitur spiritus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵ֣ב שָׂ֭מֵחַ יֵיטִ֣ב פָּנִ֑ים וּבְעַצְּבַת־לֵ֝֗ב ר֣וּחַ נְכֵאָֽה׃
verses.king_james: A merry heart maketh a cheerful countenance: but by sorrow of the heart the spirit is broken.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cor sapientis quærit doctrinam,  et os stultorum pascitur imperitia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵ֣ב נָ֭בוֹן יְבַקֶּשׁ־דָּ֑עַת (ופני) [וּפִ֥י] כְ֝סִילִ֗ים יִרְעֶ֥ה אִוֶּֽלֶת׃
verses.king_james: The heart of him that hath understanding seeketh knowledge: but the mouth of fools feedeth on foolishness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes dies pauperis, mali ;  secura mens quasi juge convivium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־יְמֵ֣י עָנִ֣י רָעִ֑ים וְטֽוֹב־לֵ֝֗ב מִשְׁתֶּ֥ה תָמִֽיד׃
verses.king_james: All the days of the afflicted are evil: but he that is of a merry heart hath a continual feast.

verses.latin_vulgate: Melius est parum cum timore Domini,  quam thesauri magni et insatiabiles.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טוֹב־מְ֭עַט בְּיִרְאַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֑ה מֵאוֹצָ֥ר רָ֝֗ב וּמְה֥וּמָה בֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Better is little with the fear of the Lord than great treasure and trouble therewith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Melius est vocari ad olera cum caritate,  quam ad vitulum saginatum cum odio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ט֤וֹב אֲרֻחַ֣ת יָ֭רָק וְאַהֲבָה־שָׁ֑ם מִשּׁ֥וֹר אָ֝ב֗וּס וְשִׂנְאָה־בֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Better is a dinner of herbs where love is, than a stalled ox and hatred therewith.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vir iracundus provocat rixas ;  qui patiens est mitigat suscitatas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִ֣ישׁ חֵ֭מָה יְגָרֶ֣ה מָד֑וֹן וְאֶ֥רֶךְ אַ֝פַּ֗יִם יַשְׁקִ֥יט רִֽיב׃
verses.king_james: A wrathful man stirreth up strife: but he that is slow to anger appeaseth strife.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iter pigrorum quasi sepes spinarum ;  via justorum absque offendiculo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דֶּ֣רֶךְ עָ֭צֵל כִּמְשֻׂ֣כַת חָ֑דֶק וְאֹ֖רַח יְשָׁרִ֣ים סְלֻלָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The way of the slothful man is as an hedge of thorns: but the way of the righteous is made plain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius sapiens lætificat patrem,  et stultus homo despicit matrem suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֣ן חָ֭כָם יְשַׂמַּח־אָ֑ב וּכְסִ֥יל אָ֝דָ֗ם בּוֹזֶ֥ה אִמּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: A wise son maketh a glad father: but a foolish man despiseth his mother.

verses.latin_vulgate: Stultitia gaudium stulto,  et vir prudens dirigit gressus suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִ֭וֶּלֶת שִׂמְחָ֣ה לַחֲסַר־לֵ֑ב וְאִ֥ישׁ תְּ֝בוּנָ֗ה יְיַשֶּׁר־לָֽכֶת׃
verses.king_james: Folly is joy to him that is destitute of wisdom: but a man of understanding walketh uprightly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dissipantur cogitationes ubi non est consilium ;  ubi vero sunt plures consiliarii, confirmantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָפֵ֣ר מַ֭חֲשָׁבוֹת בְּאֵ֣ין ס֑וֹד וּבְרֹ֖ב יוֹעֲצִ֣ים תָּקֽוּם׃
verses.king_james: Without counsel purposes are disappointed: but in the multitude of counsellors they are established.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætatur homo in sententia oris sui,  et sermo opportunus est optimus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׂמְחָ֣ה לָ֭אִישׁ בְּמַעֲנֵה־פִ֑יו וְדָבָ֖ר בְּעִתּ֣וֹ מַה־טּֽוֹב׃
verses.king_james: A man hath joy by the answer of his mouth: and a word spoken in due season, how good is it!

verses.latin_vulgate: Semita vitæ super eruditum,  ut declinet de inferno novissimo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹ֣רַח חַ֭יִּים לְמַ֣עְלָה לְמַשְׂכִּ֑יל לְמַ֥עַן ס֝֗וּר מִשְּׁא֥וֹל מָֽטָּה׃
verses.king_james: The way of life is above to the wise, that he may depart from hell beneath.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domum superborum demolietur Dominus,  et firmos faciet terminos viduæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֵּ֣ית גֵּ֭אִים יִסַּ֥ח ׀ יְהֹוָ֑ה וְ֝יַצֵּ֗ב גְּב֣וּל אַלְמָנָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The Lord will destroy the house of the proud: but he will establish the border of the widow.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abominatio Domini cogitationes malæ,  et purus sermo pulcherrimus firmabitur ab eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹעֲבַ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה מַחְשְׁב֣וֹת רָ֑ע וּ֝טְהֹרִ֗ים אִמְרֵי־נֹֽעַם׃
verses.king_james: The thoughts of the wicked are an abomination to the Lord: but the words of the pure are pleasant words.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conturbat domum suam qui sectatur avaritiam ;  qui autem odit munera, vivet.  Per misericordiam et fidem purgantur peccata :  per timorem autem Domini declinat omnis a malo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹכֵ֣ר בֵּ֭יתוֹ בּוֹצֵ֣עַ בָּ֑צַע וְשׂוֹנֵ֖א מַתָּנֹ֣ת יִחְיֶֽה׃
verses.king_james: He that is greedy of gain troubleth his own house; but he that hateth gifts shall live.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mens justi meditatur obedientiam ;  os impiorum redundat malis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵ֣ב צַ֭דִּיק יֶהְגֶּ֣ה לַעֲנ֑וֹת וּפִ֥י רְ֝שָׁעִ֗ים יַבִּ֥יעַ רָעֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: The heart of the righteous studieth to answer: but the mouth of the wicked poureth out evil things.

verses.latin_vulgate: Longe est Dominus ab impiis,  et orationes justorum exaudiet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָח֣וֹק יְ֭הֹוָה מֵרְשָׁעִ֑ים וּתְפִלַּ֖ת צַדִּיקִ֣ים יִשְׁמָֽע׃
verses.king_james: The Lord is far from the wicked: but he heareth the prayer of the righteous.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lux oculorum lætificat animam ;  fama bona impinguat ossa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְֽאוֹר־עֵ֭ינַיִם יְשַׂמַּֽח־לֵ֑ב שְׁמוּעָ֥ה ט֝וֹבָ֗ה תְּדַשֶּׁן־עָֽצֶם׃
verses.king_james: The light of the eyes rejoiceth the heart: and a good report maketh the bones fat.

verses.latin_vulgate: Auris quæ audit increpationes vitæ  in medio sapientium commorabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֹ֗זֶן שֹׁ֭מַעַת תּוֹכַ֣חַת חַיִּ֑ים בְּקֶ֖רֶב חֲכָמִ֣ים תָּלִֽין׃
verses.king_james: The ear that heareth the reproof of life abideth among the wise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui abjicit disciplinam despicit animam suam ;  qui autem acquiescit increpationibus possessor est cordis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פּוֹרֵ֣עַ מ֭וּסָר מוֹאֵ֣ס נַפְשׁ֑וֹ וְשׁוֹמֵ֥עַ תּ֝וֹכַ֗חַת ק֣וֹנֶה לֵּֽב׃
verses.king_james: He that refuseth instruction despiseth his own soul: but he that heareth reproof getteth understanding.

verses.latin_vulgate: Timor Domini disciplina sapientiæ,  et gloriam præcedit humilitas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְאַ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה מוּסַ֣ר חׇכְמָ֑ה וְלִפְנֵ֖י כָב֣וֹד עֲנָוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: The fear of the Lord is the instruction of wisdom; and before honour is humility.
